---
title: "Water Chemistry"
author: "Mariah Kachmar"
date: "2026-05-11"
output: html_document
description: 
---


#Set working directory
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/mariah.kachmar/documents/Github/EAD-ASEB_EPA_LISS_Disease_Surveillance') #Mariah's
#knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/kyra.lenderman/documents/Github/EAD-ASEB_EPA_LISS_Disease_Surveillance') #Kyra's
#knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/sarina.dery/documents/Github/EAD-ASEB_EPA_LISS_Disease_Surveillance') #Kelly's
```

#run packages
```{r}
library("ggplot2")
library("readxl")
library("plyr")                                     
library("dplyr")
library("Rmisc")
library("readr")  
library("lubridate")
library("purrr")
library(reshape2)
library(stringr)
library("RColorBrewer")
library("stringr")
library("tidyverse")
```

#Set Path
```{r}
path_out <- 'Field_Data_WaterChemistry/output/'
```

#read data files
```{r}
data_all <- list.files(path = "Field_Data_WaterChemistry/raw_data",                           # Identify all CSV files
  pattern = "*.csv", full.names = TRUE) %>% 
  lapply(read_csv) %>%                              # Store all files in list
  bind_rows                                         # Combine data sets into one data set 
data_all                                            # Print data to RStudio console

as.data.frame(data_all)                            # Convert tibble to data.frame


#dates - adding month and year

data_all <- data_all %>% rename(c("date_collected" = "Date collected", "site" = "Location" ))

#for some reason not all of the dates are cooperating need to fix this for below****
data_all <- data_all %>% dplyr::mutate(date_collected= as.Date(date_collected, format = "%m/%d/%Y"), month = month(date_collected), year = year(date_collected))

data_all

```

#Aragonite Saturation ('WAr out')
```{r}

aragonite_master_long<- data_all %>%  
                      reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("date_collected", "site","month","year"),
                                    measure.vars = c("Salinity","t(oC) of field","pH out","pCO2 out (matm)","HCO3 out (mmol/kgSW)","CO3 out (mmol/kgSW)","CO2 out (mmol/kgSW)","WAr out","xCO2 out (dry at 1 atm) (ppm)"))
head(aragonite_master_long)


mean_aragonite_plot <- ggplot(data=aragonite_master_long %>% 
          filter(variable == "Aragonite_Sat"), aes(x=month, y=value, fill=site)) +geom_boxplot()+ #scale_fill_manual(values=c("forestgreen","orange", "purple"))
  theme_bw() + theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20))+ theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12))+
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size =15))+
  labs(title="Mean Aragonite Saturation 2023 - 2026 ", x ="", y = "Aragonite Sauration (Ωar)")+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,2), breaks = seq(0, 2, by = 0.2))+
theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 12))+theme(legend.position = "none")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color = "red", size = .5) +  #red line is at equilibrium 
facet_grid(.~ year + site)

mean_aragonite_plot


```
